content: SAM2 (Meta) supports interactive click/box prompts and mask propagation; official repo (facebookresearch/sam2) provides Python inference + notebooks but no native Mac desktop GUI — Apple Silicon support requires PyTorch MPS backend, not officially documented but community-reported to work. napari plugins (napari-sam2, napari-samv2, napari-vos-sam2, Medical-SAM2GUI) wrap SAM2 inference into an interactive GUI with point-prompt clicking plus manual paintbrush/eraser correction tools, which matches this project's 'click once + manually erase bad blob' requirement.
